hero.h1: Every new part, ready for the robot in minutes.
hero.subtitle: Reads STEP geometry, detects weldable joints, calculates ISO 2553 parameters and generates KRL or URScript — so your shop can take on more orders without adding headcount.

problem.title: The bottleneck holding your shop back isn't welding — it's what comes before

items.title: Every new part starts from scratch
items.desc: Identify joints by eye, calculate parameters on paper, program the path point-by-point. Meanwhile, the robot waits and the order stays open.

items.title: Critical knowledge with no backup
items.desc: How to configure each part lives in one or two people's heads. When they're busy, on holiday, or handling another priority, the robot stops — not because the team lacks capability, but because that knowledge isn't documented or transferable.

items.title: Quoting without data
items.desc: How long does it take to configure this part? How much wire and gas does it use? Without real calculation, every quote is an estimate. And an estimate isn't a price.

solution.title: From STEP file to robot program, in 4 steps

steps.title: Load STEP
steps.desc: Upload the assembly directly from your CAD

steps.title: Automatic detection
steps.desc: The system identifies all weldable joints — fillet, butt, corner, lap

steps.title: ISO 2553 parameters
steps.desc: Effective throat, leg size, travel speed — calculated

steps.title: Export program
steps.desc: KUKA KRL or URScript, ready to load on the controller

items.title: Geometric detection of weldable joints
items.desc: Fillet, butt, corner, lap. The system analyzes the real STEP geometry and locates every weldable joint on the part mesh. Not bounding boxes or visual heuristics — geometric analysis on the actual model.

items.title: Built for someone who already knows how to weld
items.desc: Click the joint. Adjust throat, leg, and travel speed. Execute. No four-step wizards, no redundant confirmations. The system assumes you can read a welding drawing — and behaves accordingly.

items.title: Your WPS parameters, applied in one click
items.desc: Save your certified shop parameters and apply them to any joint. The next similar part inherits the configuration you've already validated.

items.title: Batch processing, unattended
items.desc: Send dozens of STEP assemblies in a batch and let them process on their own. When you come back, the work is done.

items.title: Quote before you commit
items.desc: Bead length, arc time, wire and gas consumption, total cost — calculated before striking an arc. Answer a new inquiry in minutes, not the next day.

items.title: ISO 3834 traceability, automatic
items.desc: Full history of every bead, parameter, and part. Exportable to PDF or Excel for any quality audit, with no manual logging.

steps.title: Load the assembly
steps.desc: Import any standard STEP file — the same one that comes out of your CAD. ArcIntelligence analyzes the real 3D geometry and automatically identifies all weldable joints: fillet, butt, corner, and lap.
steps.placeholder: Screenshot: ASSEMBLY tab with 3D view and highlighted detected joints

steps.title: Parameters calculated
steps.desc: Select any detected joint. The system calculates effective throat, leg size, attack angle, travel speed, and gas flow per ISO 2553. Apply your certified WPS templates in one click.
steps.placeholder: Screenshot: PARAMETERS panel with ISO 2553 geometry and pre-calculated fields

steps.title: The sequence, generated
steps.desc: Review the bead list in the side panel. ArcIntelligence proposes the optimal welding order and allows manual reordering based on your own process criteria.
steps.placeholder: Screenshot: Right panel with bead list and welding sequence

steps.title: Export to the real controller
steps.desc: KUKA KRL or URScript. The file comes out ready to load directly into the controller — no additional transformations, no extra steps.
steps.placeholder: Screenshot: Export modal with KUKA / UR selector and download button

comparison.title: New part setup: manual vs. with ArcIntelligence

marketFit.title: Is this for your shop?
marketFit.subtitle: ArcIntelligence isn't for everyone. It's for shops that already have robots — and want them producing more without setup being the ceiling on growth.
items: You have RoboDK, RobotStudio or program directly on the controller, but configuring new parts is still the slowest step
Robotic setup knowledge is concentrated in one or two people, and you want more of your team able to handle it
You get varied orders frequently and need to quote with real data before committing
You want ISO 3834 traceability without deploying a full management system

contact.title: Tell me about your shop
contact.subtitle: No pricing page, no generic demo. Tell me your robot, the parts you weld, and your monthly volume — and I'll tell you whether it makes sense for your specific situation.

form.name: Name
